home.title: Turn messy thoughts into English cues.
home.subtitle: Speak, type, drop fragments, or snap the task. Cue figures out what you want to say first.
home.inputPlaceholder: Example: Tomorrow I need to explain the Industrial Revolution. I want to say production got faster, but pollution and worker issues got worse.
home.defaultThought: I need to prepare a school speaking task. Help me build clear English cues.
home.speechUnsupported: Speech input is not available in this browser. Typing still works.
home.speechError: That did not come through. Try again or type it.
home.cameraError: Camera access failed. You can upload an image instead.

prep.title: Build the frame before you speak.
prep.thoughtPlaceholder: Add more native-language thoughts. Cue will rebuild the English cards.
prep.streamError: Cue generation failed. The backend may not be running.
prep.previewError: Real TTS failed. Check Google Cloud credentials.
prep.audioPlayError: Audio playback failed. Tap Preview again or check browser sound permissions.

stage.title: Conversation Mode
stage.defaultPrompt: Cue is listening. Finish at your own pace.
stage.micError: Microphone access failed. Allow browser microphone permission.
stage.sttError: Real STT failed. Check the audio or Google Cloud permissions.

review.title: Perfect You
review.native: How a native would say your ideas
review.error: Real review API failed. Check Gemini or TTS settings.
review.playPerfect: ▶ How a Native would say YOUR ideas
